context: Tests whether the ios-simulator skill preserves Simulator boundaries and routes hardware-dependent work to devices or sibling skills.

checklist.name: Hardware-only features
checklist.description: Routes camera capture, Bluetooth or BLE pairing, barometer behavior, and accelerometer/gyroscope-dependent behavior to real hardware testing.

checklist.name: Simulator-supported scenarios
checklist.description: Treats Face ID or Touch ID fallback, memory warnings, and manual iCloud sync triggering as Simulator-supported scenarios.

checklist.name: Performance warning
checklist.description: States that Simulator is not an accurate performance proxy for processing, graphics, memory, networking, or Metal GPU behavior.

checklist.name: APNs boundary
checklist.description: States that real APNs delivery must be verified on a device and that `simctl push` is only local payload/display handling.

checklist.name: Sibling boundaries
checklist.description: Keeps the answer focused on iOS Simulator boundaries instead of turning it into an Instruments, Core Motion, Core Bluetooth, Push Notifications, or Metal implementation guide.
